attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
    APPL.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX_KEY ,
APPL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   ,
APPL.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   ,
APPL.BK_ATTRIBUTION_SS_CD          ,
APPL.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD,
APPL.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY  ,
APPL.SALES_CREDIT_USAGE_CD         ,
APPL.SALES_CREDIT_UNALLOCATED_FLG  ,
APPL.SLS_CREDIT_ASGNMT_MODE_CD     ,
APPL.SK_TRX_SPLIT_SC_ID_INT        ,
APPL.OVERLAY_TYPE                  ,
APPL.BK_SALES_REP_NUM              ,
APPL.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD    ,
APPL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           ,
APPL.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_ID_INT,
APPL.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_NAME  ,
APPL.SRC_RPTD_REBOK_OTM_TERR_TYP_CD,
APPL.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,
APPL.BK_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME   ,
APPL.BK_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMT_RSN_CD     ,
APPL.SCA_CREATE_DTM                ,
APPL.DV_SCA_CREATE_DT              ,
APPL.SCA_LAST_UPDATE_DTM           ,
APPL.DV_SCA_LAST_UPDATE_DT         ,
APPL.SPLIT_PCT                     ,
APPL.EFFECTIVE_START_DTM           ,
APPL.DV_EFFECTIVE_START_DT         ,
APPL.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM             ,
APPL.DV_EFFECTIVE_END_DT           ,
APPL.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM             ,
APPL.DV_SOURCE_COMMIT_DT           ,
APPL.UCRM_CASE_NUM                 ,
APPL.BK_TRX_SPLIT_BU_ID            ,
APPL.SK_TRX_SPLIT_ID_INT           ,
APPL.SALES_MOTION_CD               ,
APPL.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID         ,
APPL.SPLIT_1_OFFER_ATTRIBITION_PCT ,
APPL.SPLIT_2_NEW_RENEW_PCT         ,
APPL.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT               ,
APPL.RU_REBOK_CHANNEL_FLG          ,
APPL.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
APPL.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
APPL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
APPL.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
APPL.START_TV_DTM                  ,
APPL.END_TV_DTM                    ,
APPL.SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT AS SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT ,
APPL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
APPL.ACTION_CD  ,
NSCTT.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG AS QUOTA_FLAG ,
    /* NFISMN_SYS IS USEFUL WHEN NET CHANGE RUNS FOR CATCHUP DATA (OR BACKDATING AND RUNNING NET CHANGE PART) */
    CASE  WHEN ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  ) < (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100) 
     THEN NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
     ELSE   NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT
    END AS BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT , 
    CASE  WHEN ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  ) < (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
     THEN NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
     ELSE   NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
    END AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT ,
    CASE  WHEN ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  ) < (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
     THEN (NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN_SYS.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100)
     ELSE   ( NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT+NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100  )
    END AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT  ,
RTR_ATTRIBUTION_KEY
   FROM
   (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID ='Wf_WI_REV_SCA_NRT_XAAS_SMR_TV') X,
     ( SELECT BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
     FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH 
     WHERE CURRENT_DATE-1 BETWEEN FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
    ) NFISMN_SYS ,
    $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_SNAP_XAAS_SMR APPL
   LEFT OUTER JOIN 
   ( SELECT BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE, SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_QUOTA_FLAG 
    FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_TV  
    QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE   ORDER BY END_TV_DATE DESC)=1
   ) NSCTT
    ON APPL.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE = NSCTT.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE 
    
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN  
    ON  APPL.SOURCE_COMMIT_DTM BETWEEN NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AND NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE
   WHERE  1=1 
   /* TO PULL INCREMENTALLY */ 
   AND APPL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > X.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE
   AND  NOT  /* NOT TO TAKE RETRO UPDATES */
    (   APPL.EDW_CREATE_DTM <=  X.LAST_EXTRACT_DATE   /* OLD CREATED */ 
        AND EFFECTIVE_END_DTM =  '3500-01-01 00:00:00'    /* OPEN RECORD */
    ) 
	 	AND NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_REV_SCA_NRT_XAAS_SMR_INCR_PRE PRE
 WHERE APPL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=PRE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 AND APPL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=PRE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
 AND APPL.BK_SALES_REP_NUM=PRE.BK_SALES_REP_NUM
 AND APPL.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID=PRE.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID
 AND APPL.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT =PRE.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 AND APPL.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT =PRE.TOTAL_SPLIT_PCT
 AND APPL.SALES_MOTION_CD =PRE.SALES_MOTION_CD
  )
